message.content:
@startuml
title Project - Staff - Update

participant "Client" as Client #salmon
participant "ProjectService" as ProjectService #salmon
participant "RedisCache" as RedisCache #salmon
participant "Kafka" as Kafka #salmon
participant "PersisterService" as PersisterService #salmon
participant "IndexerService" as IndexerService #salmon
participant "ErrorService" as ErrorService #salmon
participant "ElasticSearch" as ElasticSearch #salmon
database "Database" as Database

Client -> ProjectService: /project/staff/v1/_update
ProjectService -> ProjectService: Validate request body
ProjectService --> ProjectService: 

alt [request validation fails]
    ProjectService -> ProjectService: Request validation failed
    ProjectService --> ProjectService: 
    ProjectService -> Client: HttpStatus: 400 with appropriate error code
    note left of Client: Error Code: REQUEST_VALIDATION_FAILED
end

ProjectService -> ProjectService: Request validation successful
ProjectService --> ProjectService: 

alt [record doesn't exist]
    ProjectService -> RedisCache: Search record based on serverGeneratedId
    RedisCache --> ProjectService: 0 rows
    ProjectService -> Database: Search record based on serverGeneratedId
    Database --> ProjectService: 0 row
    ProjectService -> Client: HttpStatus: 400 with appropriate error code
    note left of Client: Error Code: RECORD_NOT_FOUND
end

alt [record doesn't exists in cache]
    ProjectService -> RedisCache: Search record based on serverGeneratedId
    RedisCache --> ProjectService: 0 rows
    ProjectService -> Database: Search record based on serverGeneratedId
    Database --> ProjectService: 1 row
    ProjectService -> RedisCache: 1 record
    RedisCache --> ProjectService: 
end

ProjectService -> RedisCache: Fetch the existing record
RedisCache --> ProjectService: 1 row

alt [incorrect rowVersion]
    ProjectService -> ProjectService: Compare rowVersion between request and db
    ProjectService --> ProjectService: 
    ProjectService -> ProjectService: Incorrect rowVersion [request: should be +1 only]
    ProjectService --> ProjectService: 
    ProjectService -> Client: HttpStatus: 400 with appropriate error code
    note left of Client: Error Code: BAD_REQUEST
end

ProjectService -> ProjectService: Compare rowVersion between request and db
ProjectService --> ProjectService: 
ProjectService -> ProjectService: rowVersion in request = rowVersion in db + 1
ProjectService --> ProjectService: 
ProjectService -> Kafka: Project Staff Data /update_topic
ProjectService -> RedisCache: Update new record in cache against serverGeneratedId
RedisCache --> ProjectService: 

ProjectService -> Client: HttpStatus: 202 ACCEPTED

group async
    Kafka -> PersisterService: Consume Project Staff Data
    Kafka -> IndexerService: Consume Project Staff Data
    PersisterService -> Database: Store Project Staff Data
    Database --> PersisterService: 
    IndexerService -> ElasticSearch: Update Project Staff Data
end

@enduml
